scope: single-seed exact-one-pass qualification of an explicit stochastic composition prior conditioned only on node count

model.context: constant-one null context plus node-count embedding; no geometry, lattice, blueprint metadata or target formula
model.active_vocabulary: derived once from train split and stored in checkpoint

decision_rule.pass: qualify the explicit stochastic composition state and authorize only an oracle-composition count-constrained assignment qualification
decision_rule.fail: stop before assignment and distinguish optimization from insufficient p(C|N) context; do not return to independent site-token diffusion
decision_rule.boundary: This protocol cannot qualify site assignment, free joint H1a, L1/M1, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
